input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
P=json.load(open('work/preds.json'))
# find active questions with any single outcome > 0.35
import csv
active=set()
with open('market.csv') as f:
    for r in csv.DictReader(f):
        if r['is_resolved'].strip() in ('False','false','FALSE',):
            active.add(r['qid'])
hi=[]
for q,od in P.items():
    if q not in active: continue
    for k,v in od.items():
        if v>0.35:
            hi.append((v,q,k,list(od.items())))
hi.sort(reverse=True)
print('active questions with an outcome >0.35:')
for v,q,k,items in hi:
    print(f'{v} | {q} | {k} | {items}')
print('count:',len(hi))
"
